name: Apple Kuchin
recipeInstructions:
1. Cream together the sugar and shortening until smooth.
2. Add egg to the mixture and beat well.
3. Gradually add milk and mix until combined.
4. Stir in the flour and baking powder until just mixed.
5. Spread batter evenly into a greased cake pan.
6. Arrange sliced apples over the top of the batter.
7. Sprinkle with a mixture of sugar, melted butter, and cinnamon.
8. Bake for 35 minutes at 350 degrees Fahrenheit.
9. Makes about 3 kuchen.
